x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Account Setup Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to create and initialize an incentive account for a participant.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Credit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to add earned incentives (e.g., points, bonuses, cashback) to the incentive account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Debit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to deduct incentives from the account due to usage, redemption, or expiration.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Transfer Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to move incentive value between accounts, participants, or programs.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Balance Adjustment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to correct or modify the incentive account balance due to errors or recalculations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Expiry Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to remove incentives that have expired according to program rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Redemption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to utilize incentive balances for goods, services, or monetary value.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Incentive Account Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to perform actions on the incentive account only when predefined conditions are met (e.g., eligibility, thresholds).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Incentive Account Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to execute account-related actions at predefined intervals (e.g., periodic credits or expirations).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Account Closure Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to close the incentive account and settle any remaining balances.
